singapore.scope: Facilities emitting >= 25,000 tCO2e/year; event organizers indirectly affected via supply chain

european_union.scope: EU ETS covers aviation (intra-EU), energy, heavy industry. CBAM from 2026 extends carbon costs to imports.
european_union.notes: CBAM transitional phase since Oct 2023; full implementation from 2026

united_kingdom.scope: UK ETS covers aviation, power, industry

australia.scope: Australian Carbon Credit Units (voluntary/compliance). Safeguard Mechanism covers facilities >100k tCO2e/year.

usa_california.scope: California Cap-and-Trade (large emitters). SEC climate disclosure rule from 2025.

canada.scope: Federal carbon pricing backstop. Provinces may operate own systems.

japan.scope: Tax on fossil fuels (JPY 289/tCO2e). GX-ETS full trading from 2026.
japan.scheme: Tax for Climate Change Mitigation + GX-ETS

south_korea.scope: K-ETS covers ~74% of national emissions. Third compliance period (2021-2025).

china.scope: China National ETS covers power sector (~4.5 GtCO2). Expanding to cement, steel, aluminum.

singapore.name: Energy Efficiency Fund (EEF)
singapore.benefit: Up to 50% co-funding for energy efficiency projects
singapore.eligibility: Singapore-registered companies implementing energy efficiency measures

singapore.name: Enterprise Sustainability Programme (ESP)
singapore.benefit: Up to 70% grant for sustainability projects

singapore.name: BCA Green Mark Incentive Scheme
singapore.benefit: Enhanced capital allowances for green building features

singapore.name: Investment Allowance for Energy Efficient Equipment
singapore.benefit: 100% capital allowance in year of purchase for qualifying equipment

singapore.name: Singapore Green Bonds
singapore.benefit: Government-backed green bond framework for sustainability projects

european_union.name: Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD)
european_union.benefit: Penalty avoidance: EUR 10M or 5% of global turnover

european_union.name: EU Taxonomy Alignment
european_union.benefit: Access to green finance and lower borrowing costs for taxonomy-aligned activities

united_kingdom.name: Climate Change Levy (CCL) Reduction
united_kingdom.benefit: 80% CCL discount with Climate Change Agreement

united_kingdom.name: UK Green Finance Strategy
united_kingdom.benefit: Transition Plan Taskforce guidance for net-zero aligned financing

australia.name: Australian Renewable Energy Agency (ARENA)
australia.benefit: Grants for renewable energy deployment and innovation

australia.name: Safeguard Mechanism Credits
australia.benefit: Earn tradeable credits for emissions below baseline

australia.name: Climate Active Certification
australia.benefit: Government-backed carbon neutral certification for events and organizations

usa.name: EPA Climate Pollution Reduction Grants
usa.benefit: $5B+ in grants for state/local/tribal climate action

canada.name: Federal Carbon Price Revenue Recycling
canada.benefit: Climate Action Incentive payments returned to households

canada.name: Strategic Innovation Fund - Net Zero Accelerator

switch_to_vegetarian_meal.notes: Negative cost delta = cost saving on food

local_seasonal_catering.notes: May cost slightly more but reduces food miles

rail_instead_of_short_haul.description: Replace short-haul flight with train (per passenger per 100km)
rail_instead_of_short_haul.notes: Train often cheaper than flight when time comparable

virtual_attendance_option.description: Enable hybrid/virtual attendance to cut travel emissions
virtual_attendance_option.notes: Platform cost vs saved travel and accommodation

renewable_energy_venue.description: Switch venue to renewable energy tariff

zero_waste_catering.description: Eliminate single-use plastics, compost food waste

digital_materials.description: Replace printed materials with digital (app/QR codes)

sustainable_swag.description: Replace cotton tshirt + plastic items with recycled or digital alternatives

local_venue_selection.description: Choose venue near transport hubs to minimize last-mile travel

led_lighting_upgrade.description: Switch to LED stage and venue lighting
led_lighting_upgrade.notes: Higher upfront rental but lower energy consumption

carbon_removal_purchase.description: Permanent carbon removal (biochar, DAC, enhanced weathering)
carbon_removal_purchase.quality_note: Higher cost but stronger climate impact and SBTi-preferred

scopes.scope3: All other indirect (travel, supply chain, waste)

iso_20121.name: ISO 20121 Sustainable Events Management
iso_20121.description: International standard for sustainable event management systems

iso_14064.name: ISO 14064 GHG Quantification & Reporting
iso_14064.description: Standard for quantifying and reporting greenhouse gas inventories

science_based_targets.name: Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi)
science_based_targets.target: 1.5C pathway: 50% absolute reduction by 2030 vs 2019 baseline
science_based_targets.beyondvalue_chain: BVCM: invest in mitigation beyond value chain (offsets/removals)
science_based_targets.relevance: Corporate net-zero commitments. SBTi prefers removal credits over avoidance.

tcfd.name: Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures (TCFD)
tcfd.status: Consolidated into ISSB/IFRS S2 from 2024. Many jurisdictions adopting ISSB standards.

sbtn.name: Science Based Targets for Nature (SBTN)
sbtn.description: Framework for setting corporate nature and biodiversity targets alongside climate targets
sbtn.relevance: Event venues, catering supply chains, and land use impacts
